step_variability.watch: Your steps are becoming uneven. Try to walk steadily.
step_variability.caution: Uneven steps detected. Slow down and focus on your footing.
step_variability.critical: Very irregular steps! Stop and hold the stick firmly.

lateral_sway.watch: Slight sway detected. Widen your stance slightly.
lateral_sway.caution: You are swaying. Take shorter, wider steps.
lateral_sway.critical: Heavy sway detected! Stop walking and steady yourself.

cadence_drop.critical: You have slowed down sharply. Please stop and rest.

asymmetry.watch: Uneven weight on left and right steps.
asymmetry.critical: Strong step imbalance! Hold the stick with both hands.

near_fall.caution: Near-fall pattern detected. Stop and regain balance.
near_fall.critical: Fall risk! Stop immediately and hold on!

rapid_deceleration.critical: Sudden stop detected! Are you okay?
